title: Capture API endpoint POST /api/capture
userStory: As Steve, I want a thin auth'd capture endpoint so that the PWA screen and the iOS Shortcut share one path.
acceptanceCriteria: POST accepts { text: string, tags?: string[], source?: string }
Auth: bearer token OR signed cookie
Internally enqueues to brain.pending_episodes (same queue as Phase 2 Task 2.6)
Verify: curl -H 'Authorization: Bearer ...' POST /api/capture returns 202; row appears in pending_episodes; worker drains it
